# dexidp_client_secret (Ephemeral Resource)

Ephemeral client secret for passing to resources without persisting to state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `client_id` (String) The ID of the Dex oauth2 client.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The secret for the Dex oauth2 client.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String, Sensitive) The ephemeral result containing the secret.
